mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, form_model_id, field_name, field_key, field_cpt_type, `status`, flags
mapper.insert: insert into t_wf_de_form_model_detail (gmt_create, gmt_modified, form_model_id, field_name, field_key, field_cpt_type, `status`, flags) values (#{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{formModelId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{fieldName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fieldKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fieldCptType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER})
mapper.update: update t_wf_de_form_model_detail set gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, form_model_id = #{formModelId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, field_name = #{fieldName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, field_key = #{fieldKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, field_cpt_type = #{fieldCptType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, flags = #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_wf_de_form_model_detail (gmt_create, gmt_modified, form_model_id, field_name, field_key, field_cpt_type, `status`, flags) values
(#{item.gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.formModelId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.fieldName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.fieldKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.fieldCptType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.flags,jdbcType=INTEGER})
